content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the right ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears to be on course but slightly left of center on a right-curving section.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 47, target = 47 + 5 = 52
- Waypoint 52: (4.7354, 2.8213)
- Car position: (5.6765, 2.6283)
- Bearing = atan2(2.8213 - 2.6283, 4.7354 - 5.6765) = atan2(0.1930, -0.9411)
- = 180 - atan2(0.1930, 0.9411) = 180 - 11.60° = 168.40°
- Current heading: -179.04° = 180.96°
- Delta = 168.40 - 180.96 = -12.56° → right correction needed

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead, delta to target waypoint 52 is -12.56° indicating a moderate right correction needed, so apply -10 steering to follow the waypoint line through the right curve.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track has a long straight section heading ~180° (due left/west) along y≈2.77",
    "Large left-curving loop begins around waypoint 52-60 (y increases rapidly)",
    "Car is consistently ~0.14m left of center through this section — slight left bias",
    "Full circuit ~17.7m, speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for moderate curves",
    "Use steering_angle=0 for delta <5° to avoid oscillation on near-straight sections",
    "Track width ~0.76m — 0.14m left of center is safe but watch for tightening",
    "Heading is now ~-179° (essentially due west), track curves right (south) ahead",
    "Delta -12.56° at waypoint 52 confirms right curve — use -10 steering",
    "Right curve ahead is gradual, speed 1.5 is appropriate",
    "Waypoints 47-52 show y increasing from 2.77 to 2.82 — gentle right curve"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [5.9722, 5.8700, 5.7700, 5.6765],
    "y": [2.6636, 2.6587, 2.6442, 2.6283],
    "yaw": [164.024, 170.865, 176.825, -179.042]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": -12.56,
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": -10.0
}
```
